title: Brilliant company and great makeup
review: Beautiful makeup and an easy to navigate website. I love the quiz to find your colour match its really helpful and so much better than buying blind. Great to be able to sample first and pay later too!

title: Perfect Match After One Simple Fix
review: I initially ordered the wrong shade, but after quickly reaching out to Il Makiage customer service, they were incredibly helpful. They asked a few thoughtful questions about my skin tone and undertone and matched me with the perfect shade.The foundation itself is amazing  it blends seamlessly into my skin and genuinely looks like my skin but better. The shade match is spot on, with no ashy tones or harsh lines, and it evens out my complexion beautifully without feeling heavy or cakey. It sits well throughout the day and still looks natural hours later.Between the quality of the product and the excellent customer service, the experience has been faultless. Im really impressed and would definitely recommend Il Makiage.

title: Great products
review: Was easy to find the correct shade of foundation using the online process. Love all the products I have ordered so far, primer and foundation. This is my 3rd time ordering foundation. I have ordered concealer this time, hopefully its as good ??

title: IL MAKIAGE Customer Services is 100%
review: IL MAKIAGE Customer Services is 100% amazing. Attentive and sorts out all issues, giving great advice if you are confused about foundation colours. Well done IL MAKIAGE.

title: Bought a free sample
review: Bought a free sample, and the full price came out of my account. Issue did get resolved but at the time i needed that money so caused issues for me.

title: Products are very good but ordering a
review: Products are very good but ordering a shade online is not easy.

title: I absolutely love the products
review: I absolutely love the products. The foundation especially. I love how I can postpone my subscription until I need more too! The team are absolutely fantastic and give great customer service ??The try before you buy is simple...the money is on hold on your account when you sign up. If you're not happy, return the products and cancel. The money will then not be released to ilmakiage. If you love the products as I did the money will clear to ilmakiage after the 14 days. If the shade isn't quite right they are more than happy to rectify until correct. You won't be disappointed with their products!

title: Foundation
review: I have been using these products for a couple of years now. The colour match is so quick and easy, it completely matches my skin tone perfectly. The foundation doesnt sit in the wrinkles and covers any blemishes. Leaves the face with a silky feeling and lasts all day. I get so many compliments on my complexion , not bad for 62 year old women. I will never need to try any other products as you cant compete with perfection.

title: Made Up!
review: Order Number: IM340BZ3A8DQ-U and IM340BZ3A8DQ.I actually got a perfect shade match first try. I did the quiz but was still a bit skeptical. I got shade 20 and it was damn near perfect. A work colleague told me it looked much nicer than the last one I'd tried (that colour-changing one from TikTok).I'd ordered the foundation and primer but also got 2 free gifts. ?? They threw in the foundation brush and a waterproof liquid eyeliner pen for free.Foundation is one thing I've always struggled to get right. I can never get a good match, or it's cakey or greasy. I prefer a sheer to medium coverage so that my skin still looks like skin but the product can still be built up if I wanted. This is honestly the best match I've ever had.Putting the foundation and primer to the test with a non-specific translucent setting powder, it lasted about 6 hours before getting shiny on my forehead which I easily resolved by dabbing away with tissue. Bear in mind I had no setting spray on. Over all, my skin looked great all day, no separation, a bit shiny after a few hours but easily fixed, and so far, no reactions, redness or breakouts.Very pleasantly surprised by how well everything went, first try.Happy customer. ??

review: There is no other Foundation like it. leave you looking like you woke up like just beautiful natural radiant amazing. title: I have placed another order for two products
review: I have placed another order for the foundation number 35 which really suits my colouring. Friends have commented at how nice my skin looks, since starting to use this. I have also re-ordered the waterproof liquid eyeliner - black card. I have quite watery eyes and this doesnt move! Great products. I will continuing buying these in the future. I am happy to recommend them.

title: Great find.
review: Have used same face make up for over 40 yrs , due to age changed was needed. Tried several but this makeup is just perfect for ladies with older skin. Goes on like magic looks great and dont feel though you plastered it on. Very natural looking but hides any blemishes. Over the moon with it.

title: The colour match is excellent BUT
review: The colour match is excellent but despite asking for my age and skin concerns the product does not look good on my skin. I was encouraged to change the type of foundation and buy the primer (and the customer service was excellent) but this made little difference to the suitability for my skin and I have now spent 80 odd for products I cannot wear. The response to that was to send me a voucher (thank you) and encourage me to buy the anti- wrinkle cream. The system did not allow me to use the voucher to reduce the price of the facecream so I'll have to hope that is effective - otherwise I've spent 130 for nothing and will definitely feel a bit ripped off.

title: Five Star Customer Service ?? ????????
review: Exceptional customer service and will definitely be continuing with a subscription due to this (and a great product of course). Thank you so much for all your help today Kacey.

title: Nice product easy to apply
review: Nice product easy to apply, but I would not order again due to price.Not bad as a moisturiser but does not change colour or cover up blemishes.

title: FINALLY I have found my foundation
review: I saw this advertised on my Instagram feed and saw the promises made about it. I am naturally sceptical and dont wear foundation often because I couldnt get a match to my skin.My Il Makiage foundation is the closest I have ever had. I needed only minimal blending at the edges because the match was so good.And this match was determined by simply asking me questions like which of these complexions is most like yours? I sat near a window so I could see my skin in natural daylight. After a few more questions the foundation was determined and the order made. It was so easy to do. They said it would be with me in 1-4 business days. I had it in 2. I wore it out today for a shopping trip to the city. The match was perfect. It only needed one application. It was light, smelled nice, was pleasant to the touch and held on nicely to the blush over the top. I didnt use a setting powder. It lasted all day and looked as fresh when I took it off as when I put it on. I love it.I put it on over a brightening toner, Nivea moisturiser, elf poreless primer.This is pricier than the other foundations I have tried, but my goodness you get your moneys worth.Their products are also vegan and cruelty free.I highly recommend them

title: I love this make up

title: Flawless
review: Fantastic product, fast delivery

title: The process of selecting the correct
review: The process of selecting the correct colour match for the foundation and the skin type is so unbelievably accurate, while at the same time making it incredibly simple! Absolute genius! I was delighted with the exceptional quality of the products. The waterproof liquid eyeliner is completely smudge proof. It looks exactly the same at the end of the day as it did when applied! Im hooked! Thank you! Looking forward to trying more products!

title: Great Products & Customer Service
review: I've been using IL MAKIAGE NY for some time now and I love their products. I'm over 60 and they seem to suit my skin more than high street brands. I was asked by two different friends where I buy my make up, and as I've never been asked that ever before, it must mean it looks good!Customer service is equally good; quick replies and any tiny issue resolved straight away.

review: The makeup is fair, nothing amazing. But what I really had a problem with was the 10 credit that was supposed to apply automatically and it didnt. When I contacted customer service, they didnt even attempt to make it right. The products are way overpriced for their mediocre performance. Max Factor is cheaper and better quality.

title: Amazing products
review: Amazing products, and I really like them. My skin is soft and moist

title: My blue eyeliner is gorgeous
review: My blue eyeliner is gorgeous. I have sensitive eyelids and a lot of mascaras irritate them. This did not.Arrived quickly and Customer Services followed up to check I was happy. Would highly recommend the product and service.The negatives I would say and these are generational, they started the email follow up with Hi Love and finished with a red heart. I personally dont like being being greeted with Hi love from a person I have never met before. But I raised this with Customer Services and they replied immediately and said it was only meant to convey warmth and positivity but took onboard my comments. You cant ask for more.

title: Beautiful products
review: I have just been using the Il Makiage primer, (personal matched) foundation and concealer and I have to say it really does everything it says.My skin looks bright and clear.Makeup not cloggy at all. Love it

title: I have only just bought Ilmakiage
review: I have only just bought Ilmakiage, buying was very easy, not pushy which is good. I have not tried the make up yet, I don't usually wear make up, so we shall see. So far, so good.

title: Il Makiage make up range suits my skin type
review: The make up range suits my skin type perfectly! I wear make up every day for work and this match is perfect for touch ups through the day with no cracks just a smooth even finish! What a god send!I have found Il Makiage true to their word of being light weight and full coverage. I really does last all day always giving me a lovely health look that everyone notices!This foundation is so easy to manage and touch up when needed are no problem some times I dont even need to touch up! Which is Fanatic!What more do you want for the perfect base to your everyday or event make up look?Every time I order Il Makiage I like to take time to fill out the match maker quiz to ensure my tone is matched with the time of year.. It was a perfect match first time and I am looking forward to seeing if my winter skin order I have just completed impresses me more.I would like to say the free gifts are such a lovely gesture and I look forward to reviewing them. Such good quality and the packages in very professional and fun to unbox.Fantastic experience through out the whole journey.I was sent the water proof eyeliner in black the first time which I am still using! I love the produce and would look into ordering it again but in a different colour. Very easy to use and lasts all day with no smudging! Its a dream eyeliner and I would highly recommend others to give it ago if a pen felt tip liner is their thing!I am extremely exited for my next order! The compliments I get is such a confidence boost! And for an anxious person its worth every penny! Thank you Il Makiage.I urge everyone to give it ago for sure! X

review: Customer service is outstanding, response time is within 24 hours for first response and after that they answer within 1 hour or less.Drew was professional, helpful and delivered great service.

title: Great customer service
review: I opted for the Try before you Buy and I was unsure of the shade that was recommended, they helped me with questions to pick another shade and sent it straight away. They have made this process easy and show they really care about the customer experience.

title: Overall
review: Overall, I am very happy with the product, especially the foundation, and I would definitely recommend it to anyone looking for reliable, natural-looking coverage with a comfortable feel.

title: Excellent products. five star
review: I purchased the foundation and as an older lady it's hard to get one that doesn't show pores and fine lines. It's been great. I have been given a discount code to use so have now purchased from them again a different item. Fast delivery and good communication. Well recommended.

title: Excellent products
review: I previously ordered the no filter primer & foundation & its the best Ive ever used to cover my open pores & acne scars.Have now ordered the powder redo wrinkle fix & cant wait to try it!

title: Scam company renewing against my will.
review: You have no subscription Im in the auto tab and tell me where is there any function to ensure this is full cancelled!!!How do you explain that once a year my account is being charged and orders are made without my consent - this is theft and fraud.You are lying when you say to just edit my settings.There is clearly something in my account that is sending out a fraudulent order once a year!See below - cancelled in 2024 yet order is sent 1/2/25.I had to complain in 2025, I never got my money back. My account was cancelled.Again order going out against my will in 1/2/26 even though I cancelled the account.I dont want an AI reply I want to speak to someone on the phone urgently

title: This is a scam
review: This is a scam, it said I was getting a free bottle to try, postage was 4.95, which was fine. I took a screenshot of my cart, which said total was 4.95 and 0.00 beside foundation. Put in my credit card and got a notification that they were trying to take 49.95.

review: I was really excited to try IL?MAKIAGE products and thought I was only paying 4 for postage. If someone from IL?MAKIAGE could help me, it would mean so much and I would be incredibly grateful.Order number: IM340CNLVV3H

title: Amazing customer service
review: My first colour match was too light for me but I cant fault them on their customer service to resolve this, I highly recommend this company.

title: Great customer service
review: Unfortunately couldnt quite get it right as far as the colour match was concerned, was offered a replacement still didnt suit. Customer service team were brilliant so although this didnt work for me this time (daughter & granddaughter love it) I would recommend.

title: Happy to help with requests
review: Good company and happy to help with all requests My shade was too pale and was prompted to an exchange rather than a refund so will wait and see what happens with my next foundation. If this is the same I will ask for a refund Hopefully this won't be the case

title: Quick and easy
review: Quick and easy. Finally got the right shade too.

title: great customer service
review: really helpful customer service team!

Like some others I was confused by the 39 charge but this was only a pending charge that automatically dropped off my account after a few days. The staff at Il Makiage were very quick to explain and I was more than happy. Would recommend. Lovely foundation which you can leave as light or build up. Will be keeping my subscription to them.

title: Best Make up for wrinkles
review: I bought this Make up as my regular one is getting too cakey- umpteen people have asked what I am wearing - I love it.

title: Trying to cancel future deliveries is
review: Trying to cancel future deliveries is not easy with this company. Products are good but I just dont want any more arriving

title: Great quality products - try before you buy!
review: I wasn't sure about buying makeup I hadn't tried before but the "try before you buy" option rally does work. I used the foundation chooser and I've been delighted with the product and coulour match. I've now bought the primer and an eyeshadow and yes it is a little more expensive than I would usually buy but it's worth the price in quality and look. My foundation stays put, it's smooth and I have a natural look when it's on. I have older skin so to cover fine lines and wrinkles can be a challenge. I will be buying again - rememeber...buy cheap, buy twice. I recommend you use the try before you buy option to make sure you've picked the right one for you

title: Absolutely my go-to foundation!
review: Absolutely my go-to foundation as it ticks all the boxes, smooths pores & wrinkles, hides redness & darkness under the eyes, buildable (if you choose a buildable coverage) love the questionnaire helping you to choose the right shade & coverage.Whats not to love ? Long lasting too!

title: Brilliant moisturising product my skin
review: Brilliant moisturising product my skin feels soft and pliable now (I am 70 next month!!!) my skin feels completely different now and nothing like (old womans skin!!!)

title: Just wow its fantastic
review: The last year so I have really lacked confidence with my skin and aging wrinkles fine lines!. But Ive since been using the I MAKIAGE foundation and power re do and wow its made such a huge difference to my confidence! I highly recommend this high quality skin care and make up :)

title: Always quick and simple
review: Always quick and simple, always a little discount, great product

review: I feel like I was ripped off good and proper. I order the foundation for 4.95 and was subscribed. I cancelled the subscription instantly. Today 39.00 came out of my account for the foundation. So this product has cost me 44.00. Never would I pay that for make up.Maxine Frost

title: Fantastic product
review: Fantastic product! I didn't think I had uneven skin colour until I tried this product. The result is smooth, evenly toned skin. The product is silky, goes on like a dream. I now use every day. Speedy delivery too@

title: SAMPLE ITEMS IS A SCAM!!!!
review: Absolute scam. Says you can get a free sample of any products - I opted for the foundation and concealer and was told all I needed to do was cover the 4.95 postage fee.However I paid this and got another confirmation email saying 66 was on hold as its actually full sized items which you decide If you like and if you do keep them If not have to pay to return.I dont even know if its my shade and I have a full sized item of it - defeats the whole point of it being sample size lolUNHYGENIC af, everyone can return used full size makeup items if they wish - rankThey should inform you of this before you purchase instead of taking it out your account as it isnt 0 as they state is it???Absolute scam of a company

title: I dont usually wear make up
review: I dont usually wear make up, im 63 years of age and very occasionally I like to apply make up. I haven't found anything that suits my skin, or sits so light on my skin and gives me a great coverage with little effort like these products. It will last me ages but im so happy with my purchases.

title: I love all the products
review: I love all the products but have had to cancel all my auto replenishments as my financial circumstances have changed. I am so dissapointed. I would thoroughly recommend all products and will purchase again as finances allow. I particularly recommend the re plumping gel

title: Still not convinced
review: I have to admit the foundation is great and although expensive, the results were lovely. That saidIve bought several other products and given the higher price, I reasonably believe you can buy products just as good and for much less elsewhere. I recently got bought the redo wrinkle fix which I was very excited to try. It was a very small jar and simply felt like a thicker version of their primer. In my opinion, a good primer will give better results. I love the idea of this brand and their style but Im still not convinced the products are worth it.

title: Return service difficult
review: Great concept, the product is just not a match for skin. They have made the return process so difficult that I will now go over my trial period and be charged the full price by default even after attempting to reason with customer service.

title: Great company. Great products
review: Great company.. lovely makeup.. been using it for a couple of years now.. not been disappointed when tried new products.. and with each order, you receive a free gift ??

title: Excellent customer service
review: Excellent customer service, prompt answers fix any problems quality products, bit more expensive than other brands but the proof is in the pudding. Worth that little bit more, hey I am 60 and deserve a decent make up bag, definitely worth a try, well recommended thank you to the whole team

title: This item is absolutely amazing and I
review: This item is absolutely amazing and I will use it for ever.Just be careful when ordering it is very easy for extra items to be added too your basket which pushes the price up. After trying to contact customer service in several ways I am still waiting for a reply.

title: Wow! Wow! Wow! Wow!
review: Wow! Wow! Wow! Wow! Wowzer!Thank you, the primer is off the scales. Amazing product. Really holds my make in place for upto 24 hrs. Highly recommend.Thank you

title: Overpriced & shady subscription
review: The product itself is pretty good, but it was hugely overpriced for what it was!!!Plus, their way of trying to subscribe you to their service is pretty shady & difficult to sign out from....

title: Very efficient
review: Very efficient

title: Exceptional
review: Their products are of good quality. Ordering and receiving is so simple. I love thier little surprise gifts. Also with the auto-replenish I don't have to remember to reorder the next product.

title: Always fast delivery and quality
review: Always fast delivery and quality products

title: Scam
review: Scam, avoid!!!!!!Orfered free sample to pay delivery only 4.95 and was charged 59Scandalous. Please avoid this company!!!!

title: Absolutely fantastic products
review: Absolutely fantastic products, purchased them over and over, would definitely recommend ????

title: Best Lip Liners on market
review: I love their waterproof lip liner. Stays on for ages & super quality. The antique pink also matches my lip colour so looks natural. Highly recommend

title: Watch your back account
review: Make up not that great, especially as the prices arent cheap. Returned my trial box and a few weeks later got charged 139 for no items whatsoever!

title: Free trial was an easy process
review: The product was a little to expensive for me, but the ordering process of the free trial was excellent. Easy to do and no hassle returns, if you want to try i would definitely recommend.

title: Make it easier for customers to reorder
review: Got their eventually as it was not easy on the system to use my e-gift code and had to send an email couple of times for response to get it right, hence able to apply the e-gift code to purchase item. Still did not qualify for a free brush which I was hoping to get as this is my second order for the foundation.

title: Unclear pricing
review: I had a bottle of try before you buy and iy was mis matched and too pale. They told me to keep it despite me offering to send it back. They kindly rematched and the 2nd bottle was fab, however - I was charged 27 and 39 in the space off 11 days ! So one bottle has effectively cost me 66 and no foundation is worth that ! Needless to say I jave cancelled and will not be getting any more !

title: Order received promptly
review: Order received promptly.Branded packaging very smart and robust. Could send direct to a recipient as a gift.

title: Fantastic customer service
review: Fantastic customer service. When the foundation came used it for a week and got in touch to ask what the next shade up was because it felt a little too light. Emailed me straight back the next day and sent the new shade out. Love the foundation recommended to friends who have ordered the foundation. I will order the foundation again its amazing. I've been back on the website and ordered the primer to try.

title: Free Trial lies AND no quality control
review: Wow. I am extremely disappointed with this experience.First, the foundation shade was completely off. That can happen with online shade matching, so while frustrating, I was willing to overlook it.What I cannot overlook is that the blush and bronzer arrived completely shattered  reduced to dust. The outer shipping box was pristine, which strongly suggests the products were packaged and sent in that condition. There was no visible damage to the box that would explain the destruction inside.Even more concerning is the billing practice. I enrolled in the advertised trial period specifically because it stated I would not be charged unless I decided to keep the products. Despite this, I was charged the full product price immediately after placing the order. On top of that, I was charged shipping twice  once to send the items without charge during the trial, and again when the full price was processed on the same day.Charging customers immediately while advertising a risk-free trial is misleading at best.Between receiving damaged products and being billed in contradiction to the trial terms, this experience felt deceptive and poorly handled.I expected better transparency and quality control.

title: False advertisement
review: False advertisement. A week later and 3 attempts to find a "perfect match" I gave up. I dont want to go through the whole shade choice they have available to find my match. This was meant to be hassle free and easy thing to do. If I want a real perfect match, I will go to any mall and sit down with a professional make up artist that will be able to find my match. This not as advertised. I also want to mention their products are so cheap and dry your skin out competely, enhancing any imperfections you may have. Customer service is pretty much non existen. You email with questions, they answer the following day on one that has been selected out of all. Then you ask again, and you only get one response a day later. Prolonging and creating unnecessary frustrations.Dont waste money and time, ladies. Treat yourself to something you deserve.

title: Great customer service, top notch!
review: Great customer service and I cannot recommend the products highly enough!Ive been shopping with IL MAKIAGE for the past six years now and have never had any problems with the products.

title: Opened my delivery and its damaged
review: Opened my delivery and its damaged. Contacted them straight away and got a response and new order sent straight away.

title: Best foundation ever.
review: I've ordered foundation previously & know my shade already, but I did a check questionnaire in case anything had changed, & the information was consistent. Easy to order. Reasonable prices

title: Shade-match Quiz is no where near accurate! False advertisement
review: November 2025:So this review is after using the foundation and concealer after about 6-12months. So I did their online quiz and ordered the shade they reccomended. Upon receiving the package I was over the moon excited, only to have my happiness crushed! The shade was so off for both foundation and concealer, and even the undertone was off. Also I would like to say that the concealer and foundation undertones were off the chart different from eachother when it was recommended to me at checkout as complimentary to the foundation shade theyve let their online quiz decide for me. Makes no sense! I was so disappointed with it. The only reason I did not return it was because It was during a period where I was unable to travel to return.So tip is dont fall for the propaganda of the quiz forming the perfect shade for you - I was hopeful and it failed miserably. I am really good at picking my foundation shades so thats why I thought Id give this company quiz a go - BIG MISTAKE. Safe to say I wont be purchasing from them again.However that being said, the formula is very nice and I have made it work after having to mix various different foundations with it such as my nars naturally radiant foundation and my Charlotte tilbury beautiful skin foundation. This is the only reason why its getting a 2 star review and not 1 star.Formula is good but the shade is so off its abysmal.

title: A premium make up brand for everyone
review: Free trials with the most expensive product. Credits for repeat purchases! I can't fault this company. Their products are glorious. I use their power redo wrinkle fix. I feel naked without it. And it's invisible !! Amazing

title: The negative reviews dont lie
review: The negative reviews dont lie! Please only buy their product if youre getting it on your own free will and not based off an ad on a social media site. Youll be lured into thinking you are getting the free trial product for just shipping fee price, then they go ahead to charge the full cost of the product and tell you theyll refund you if you send back the product after 14 days trial? Why isnt that stated in bold before the purchase is made? You think youre paying 5 for a trial product and end up being charge 85 for the full product. Thats low! Definitely cannot recommend! Avoid at all costs!!!

title: SCAM
review: i was offered free trial and just discrovered they are trying to charge me full price. Whats more troubling is that I did go through with the transaction.I WILL WRITE THIS AGAIN SINCE REPLY IGNORES THIS. I did NOT CONFIRM THE TRANSACTION. And advertising something as free when if fact you need to pay for this just later, is unethical marketing technique! FREE means free! Not paid later! And to take money and process orders, you required to wait for confirmation from the customer! AND IN MY CASE YOU DID NOT. calling my bank tomorrow. disgusted!

title: for the price, not a good product
review: The company themselves in terms of customer service did nothing wrong but, as for the product, I don't recommend it. I bought it under the pretence that, if I wasn't satisfied within 2 weeks, you get your money back and, whilst I think that's a great idea, I don't think it's long enough, It also says it takes a bit of time for the product to get used to your skin (about 2 weeks) so you're stuck between a rock and a hard place. I didn't like how it went on my skin, it was very cakey (more so than supermarket brands) but, I wanted to give it a fair chance. After 2 weeks of it getting used to my skin, it didn't change and I lost the window to get my 66 back. I've actually gone back to my reliable Maybelline foundation. 1/4 of the price and a much better foundation with more coverage and less cakey on your skin.

Easy to use website,Delivered quickly, plus 2 free gifts, which were very much appreciated,Eyeliner and foundation brush.Ive Worn the foundation every day since receiving it, covers dark spots when layered, long lasting too, I've had a few compliments and people asking me what foundation am I wearing? Looks Fabulous.I've reordered and will continue too. ??

title: Unclear offer but good service
review: I heard about the try before you buy foundation offer on social media and decided to try it since it said Id only need to pay around 2.40 for shipping. After ordering, the 2.40 was taken as expected, but I also noticed a 39 pending charge that wasnt shown at checkout.I contacted customer service (who were genuinely quick - replies came within about 10 minutes), and they explained that the 39 was a pre?authorisation that would only go through if I kept the product after the 14?day trial. I had assumed I was receiving a sample, but they clarified that it was actually a full?sized item and that returning it within 14 days would cancel the charge.The shade I received ended up being about two shades lighter than my skin tone, so it wasnt a match for me. The order also came with a free gift, which was a nice touch.I returned the foundation and received the refund the same day. The shipping fee wasnt refunded, but it wasnt worth the hassle to chase it up. Later on, customer service reached out with a small gesture of goodwill to make up for the confusion, which I really appreciated.Overall, the process worked smoothly once everything was explained, and the customer service team were genuinely helpful. I just think the try before you buy offer could be explained more clearly upfront to avoid confusion.

title: Im 60 years young??and saw the
review: Im 60 years young??and saw the foundation pop up on social media with a free try before you buy. I dont wear make up often but needed to replace my collection due to shelf life being past. Ordered and delivery was great, really fast. The shade was only a slight tint off ( probably my fault on self test). I didnt bother too much as it was beautiful on the skin. Next day I got an email thanking me for my custom and any problems to reply. I mentioned it being slightly off and immediately I got an email stating a replacement was on its way, keep the original one, a free liquid eye liner, a code for 15 off next order and a full refund!!! OMG!! NO COMPANY IVE EVER COME ACROSS WOULD OR HAS EVER DONE THIS FOR CUSTOMER SATISFACTION UNBELIEVABLE WELL DONE ILL MAKIAGE, ILL BE BUYING THE FULL RANGE!??

title: This IL MAKIAGE offer is a SCAM
review: This IL MAKIAGE offer is a SCAM. the FREE trial sample cost S/H 5.99 is a SCAM and they charge you for the next shipment also 100.00+.The say oh don't like is return it, and no changes will be made. all Bogus. once you order the sample.. they also send in the next full order 10000+. which cant be cancelled, even though it wont ship for 30 days...here is there response.."I do see that our systems have already transmitted your order over to our warehouse, which happens immediately to ensure the fastest possible delivery. Once this happens, orders cannot be edited or cancelled."DONT FALL FOR THIS SCAMAs for the return " If you dont love the product, you can send it back with our pre-paid return label and you wont be charged." no such label. even went on site to get one---nothing,,, another lie

title: While I didnt meet the returns
review: While I didnt meet the returns deadline as I failed to notice the terms and conditions, the company still took the time to review my situation. They clearly explained the policy but went above and beyond by offering me a voucher as a goodwill gesture. I really appreciate the fairness and professionalism shown  excellent customer service.

title: Definitely recommend ??
review: For years I have always had the same foundation until a few years ago I found my skin had changed so much. My foundation looked horrible ?? I wasn't expecting much for this if I was honest but thought I would it ago. I blooming love it! It sets really well and I am very happy with it. I have now put my second order in and I still have loads from the first bottle left.

title: Omg this product is like velvet on your
review: Omg this product is like velvet on your skin highly recommend

title: Unfortunately I would not recommend
review: Unfortunately the foundation is not like shown on all the social media. The shade they sent me was okay but they sent me a matte finish that turkey looked like I'd painted my face. So I asked for a refund, they sent me out a non matte finish foundation which the lid dispenser did not work so I tried to use it by pouring but it was this like water and ran everywhere. The finish was also not very good it sat in my fave lines and makes me look 10 years older. Sadly I would not recommend. But customer service was excellent and did send me a refund when I said I wasn't happy again.

title: Recommended
review: The customer service is quick and helpful, they cherish customers' needs and preferences. The makeup itself is high quality and lasts long.

title: Efficient and high quality
review: Ive Been using Il Makiage for about 3 years now. Ordering is easy on their web site and delivery is always within a few days. If Im not happy I can easily return an item. I love the mascara and eyebrow pencils.

title: Ive been using this company for about
review: Ive been using this company for about a year now and their products are excellent. The only annoying thing is that although I DID subscribe after my first purchase, AND I have received monthly items ever since, they KEEP asking me to subscribe.I AM ALREADY SUBSCRIBED SO STOP ASKING ME!!

title: nw after a few purchases I am on the
review: nw after a few purchases I am on the subscription as i love the foundation so much - light and great coverage - would hate to run out

title: Replacement Order Quickly Rectified
review: Received my foundation subscription which unfortunately the bottle was broken. Prompt response to my email and new one on its way. Great service and friendly easy actions to rectify.....well done Remi.

title: Products don't work, added to a subscription without my knowledge. Scammed again
review: Products don't work. And again another company that signs you up to a monthly subscription. This is now the new scam

title: Nice foundation
review: Brought some foundation on a trial offer. Received the package and liked the product; however, I was sent another item without ordering it. I had been set up in a subscription without realising. The foundation is more expensive than my usual, and I finally managed to cancel my subscription. However, I kept the products because the foundation is actually quite nice and works well with my skin tone.

title: Grateful for the customer service
review: After the shock of the charges attempted by the company. Yesterday, Monday, I received a response from customer service and they refunded the 64 to my account, so, to be fair they did respond promptly. Unfortunately, I am going to return the product as soon as I receive it because I no longer trust them. But I am very grateful for the response I received.

title: Sometimes not accurate with skin colour
review: Sometimes not accurate with skin colour test but lovely if u match it especially for older skin

title: Nothing particularly special
review: Sold through social media as a "try before you buy" deal but when you click through, they take your money for the product anyway, and try to sign you up for a subscription. Nevertheless I gave it a go. Product was ok, if a little light for my skin tone. But not worth taking out a subscription so I didn't buy it again.

title: Beyond helpful
review: Beyond helpful! So quick to come back to me on an order that had gone missing and shipped a new one out right away.

title: The way they find your shade was not so
review: The way they find your shade was not so bad, the reason why im giving 4 stars is because of how the foundation was. It was soo dry and cakey, the colour did not match at all whatsoever. I wrote i have dry skin i wanted a dewy foundation light coverage. I did not get that. I dont recommend this brand. Id rather go and test and wear the foundation before buying it. However i did receive a free gift which was good.

title: My 1st foundation was just to dark for
review: My 1st foundation was just to dark for me so after a quick email customer service sorted my new order out

title: I think this might be a scam
review: I think this might be a scam. Took advantage of the free bottle. Now cant log in to send back or cancel. No email chain of my order. Have tried to log in with password and website states I am blocked. I want to cancel and have no way of doing so. Very frustrating. Product is ok

title: Il makiage is your product
review: Good shopping experience, personalised and with a wide range of products. If you get the wrong one, theres never a problem as they are keen on exchanging. Very positive Customer care experience .

title: Went for try before buy trial and got charged straight away. Can't cancel either
review: Saw an add on Instagram claiming you could try before buying, added the 2 things and pressed to subscribe to pay less in case I kept the products, but I was charged the full price straight away plus shipping. Tried to look for a way to cancel everything and there's no such option online. Haven't even received it yet but already know it's a scam.

title: Too slick and confusing
review: All the ordering with "try fo free" is nonsense. Took the money immudiately, along with other "add on items" I was not even aware I added on.The whole 'process' is fast, confusing and a tad too slick.. Be careful with your money.Products ARE amazing, but not the pre-purchase rituals and chaos

title: Amazing products and customer service ??
review: When I first purchased my foundation, smoothing base cream and the translucent powder, I didn't like any of it. The powder is sooo fine, it's literally feather like. However it SMELLS DEVINE, but it just went everywhere and the little container is not the best, so I hated the way it went everywhere! BUT... there is a but, IT'S actually THE BEST POWDER I have tried in my life, and I am old enough to say I tried hundreds of these before. So definitely buy it, the container is annoying but VERY LITTLE goes a long way! I never sweat on my face anymore, no shine whatsoever all day!!!!! It sets the amazing foundation so beautifully, I mean it smoothes out my wrinkles and the cover is superb and looks so natural. I haven't tried anything else so far, but today I purchased their concealer and ordered another foundation as well. They gave me the foundation brush as a gift with the 1st order. However, I like using my fingers. The brush is so beautiful, if you prefer applying it this way. I am a customer forever now ??????

title: It's nothing amazing
review: It's nothing amazing. Personally I still prefer estee lauder double wear foundation. The one they sent is lighter so that don't help. Concealer is 6/10 I don't see massive coverage of my dark circles like lancome.

title: Still a great product
review: Still a great product! Just be careful to not sign up for their marketing emails, they'll drive you mad.

title: Highly Recommended Company
review: I unknowingly added an item to my basket when placing my most recent order. Contacted Il Makiage customer service as soon as I noticed and the item was cancelled and refunded to my account within hours. I cant praise this company enough. Other make up companies have a lot to learn in the customer service from Il Makiage. Thank you

title: My purchase has not arrived
review: My purchase has not arrived. It is the main present for my daughter, so I'm getting worried that it won't arrive in time for Christmas.

title: No difference to any other save your money
review: This makes us no different to usual. In the supermarket, it's gone by the time you get home after work. I can't believe I fell for it. Absolutely no difference... I wasn't impressed with the price. I thought it would do something like the videos show/adverts... No, it's nothing like that. Save your pennies and get your usual; there isn't any difference...

title: I fell for the Tiktok spiel
review: Bought the foundation and the concealer, I don't wear much makeup but wanted my skin to look a bit less flawed. Answering the questions with the same answers gave me 3 different options, I gave up and chose my own. Although the colour is ok it's no better than a supermarket option, the concealer isnt great and I got a free gift of a liquid eyeliner after stating I don't really wear make up. Not as tailored as they want you to think. Then I am inundated with emails being called love, it's annoying so unfortunately I won't be a repeat buyer.

title: Avoid, misleading offer
review: I purchased the 'try before you buy' foundation where the ad states you 'only pay postage'. The process was fine and I thought everything was ok until I realised they had taken 55 from my account as a holding payment for the foundation, which I did not agree to.I have reached out to cancel my order, as I don't like being blindsided by a offer, and, while they are responsive, they are not particularly helpful, telling me I have to complete a return to see if I am eligible to cancel it - not sure why can't customer services do that for me and avoid further delays?!. I don't have an order number so now I am in a back/forth with customer services that will inevitably delay resolving this, meaning the item will likely be shipped before I cancel it, which I am sure is their preferred outcome anyway.Their offer of 'try before you' is misleading and false. They should not be holding your money hostage as soon as you order and if I knew this was the case, I would never have ordered.

title: Dishonest, Unaccountable, Lack of Transparency
review: I am leaving this review after multiple attempts to resolve an issue directly with customer service, which have been ignored.I ordered using the Try Before You Buy offer. Shortly after placing the order, a pre-authorisation for the full product amount was placed on my card, reducing my available balance. The confirmation email stated that this hold would disappear within 14 days. It did not.I contacted customer service to query this, acknowledging that a pre-authorisation is not a completed charge, but explaining that the funds were not accessible to me and that the stated timeframe had already passed. Rather than addressing this, the response relied on generic explanations and did not acknowledge the incorrect 14 days wording or the impact on my available balance.I then replied in detail, clearly setting out each concern point by point, including the misleading timeframe, changing explanations, and inconsistent trial terms. That email has been ignored. None of the issues raised were addressed.At the same time, I clearly stated that I did not wish to continue with the purchase and asked for return instructions. Despite this being explicit, I have still not been provided with any information on how to return the products. At the time of writing, I am actively trying to return the items but have been unable to do so due to a lack of response.The pre-authorisation was eventually released by my bank, confirming the payment was not captured. However, this only happened after I intervened myself, and it does not excuse the lack of transparency, the shifting explanations, or the complete failure to communicate regarding a return.It is a shame, as the product itself was good. Unfortunately, the way this issue has been handled  scripted responses followed by silence  has completely undermined my trust. I would not recommend this company based on customer service alone.If you are considering this free trial, be aware that your available balance may be affected for longer than stated, and that resolving issues or arranging a return may not be straightforward.

title: Their customer service is very very
review: Their customer service is very very good. I was so frustrated before cause of pre authorisation payment which I was unaware but they explained and sorted for me

title: Too soon to review
review: Only ordered a product, so cant really review properly as I cant comment on delivery or product or customer services.

title: Absolute scam artists
review: Absolute scam artists, as many others have said, they draw you in and let you believe you are getting a trial product for 4.95, nowhere does it say they are doing to take a further 39 from your account and set up a monthly subscription which I had specifically ticked the box which said I do not want a subscription. You try and process a return online and it constantly tells you the page is down, after emailing them directly and demanding a refund and return they finally sent me a postage label but when I rang PayPal to make sure no more money could be taken they informed me that ilmakiage had set up a monthly subscription! The product received was not fantastic either, I prefer my 6 W7 foundation. Buyers beware!

title: beware of the hidden subscriptions
review: Nice looking products but beware of the hidden subscriptions!! Not a happy customer, friendly but wont be going back!

title: Cheeky
review: Cheeky! Sent me a text with 20 off. Went to buy a product but only offered 10 off using the same code! Then had the audacity after I purchased it to "add to the delivery" exactly the same product I'd just bought with 20 off! Don't like these games, won't buy from them again.

title: Customer service is unbeatable
review: Customer service is unbeatable. Although the coverage of the foundation was slightly too light for me, another is being sent along with a discount code off my next purchase. All processed immediately without any hassle. I will definitely be using this again and sharing my experiences with friends and family ??

title: Try before you buy..
review: Try before you buy..Who wouldnt! Wow.Got. Tried. Did not suit my skin.Advised I could keep my order.Double wow! Yeah it didnt work for my skin but. The mascara & brush would be used.Advised no charge to be made.Hmmmmm 2-3 days later 66 taken from my account!!! Oops! Big wow no longer :(Advised if payment was taken itd be refunded within 10 days.10 days come.. they go.2 emails later. Nothing. No refund. No reply! What. Why. One very happy customer now one very very unhappy customer!I was actually advised if payment had not yet been taken. It would NOT be. It was. 66 down. Bank charges along with late payment fees! OMG! Noooooo!!!All of this was advised to them in my 2nd email. Unfortunately no response. No refund.Its very true..If it looks/sounds too good to be true. It is!!!Id of loved the foundation to look amazing etc. not found a love of such for too long!So very disappointed.

title: Buyer beware - thieves!
review: I took the foundation type test with free trial item.Free apart from 2.49 postage and packaging.I learned the next day they had leached onto my PayPal account and deducted 39.This is unacceptable, poor business practice and legally theft. I reported it to the Police. Immediate refund.I no longer care about your products as your company practice is dishonest.

title: Beware I was told 6.95 for shipping
review: Beware I was told 6.95 for shipping they took that plus 194 for pre-authorization said it would be off 1-4 days. I asked four times to cancel my order and to return my money they have ignored me and turned around and sent it. I told my bank I authorized the 6.95 but nobody asked me about the 194 so since I emailed them 4 times saying cancel and they still sent it after that I will get my money back I am also contacting class action attorney this is bull and it's fraudulent

title: I've used ILMakiage products and I have
review: I've used ILMakiage products and I have no regrets at all. I like every product I have bought from them.

title: Kai was so lovely in helping me with my
review: Kai was so lovely in helping me with my mad midnight purchase, they took away all my anxiety and sorted my refund straight away! ??

title: Thought I was buying a tester for 4
review: Thought I was buying a tester for 4 turned out it was a subscription and they took 97 from my account and then tried to again on Christmas Eve!!In the words of another consumer who has it exactly rightMy experience with IL MAKIAGE was extremely disappointing. Their business practices are not consumer-friendly, and dealing with customer service felt unnecessarily difficult and stressful.There was a clear lack of transparency and accountability, and resolving a straightforward issue required far more effort than it should. The overall process left me with little confidence in how customers are treated once payment has been taken.I strongly advise potential customers to think twice, keep all receipts and evidence, and monitor their bank statements closely. Based on my experience, I would not purchase from this company again.

title: Ilmakiage eyeliners are waste of money
review: Ilmakiage eyeliners are waste of money. I bought 2 of the LONG-WEAR EYE PENCIL Cosmo (LUSTRE). Is not a long wear at all. It was such an inconvenience. Ruined my whole makeup at the very beginning of the party. Do Not BUY IT...

title: Avoid.
review: I ordered what was supposed to be a free tester, but 56 was taken from my account. The parcel arrived and it was not a tester  it was a full-sized product, unopened. I returned it because even if it had worked for me, I wouldnt have kept it. For that price, I could have bought a much better brand.They only refunded 40, so I ended up paying 16 for nothing, which is very disappointing. I would not recommend this to anyone  avoid.

title: Absolute Scam!!
review: Absolute Scam!!Do not buy. They lure you in with Try before buy but they dont tell you that you only have two weeks to make your mind up and send the products back. Rather than contacting you at the end of the trial to see if you are happy with the product or not, they take the full price out of your account. The foundations coverage was not great, it was drying and cakey. I feel totally scammed and would hate anyone else to feel the same.

title: Putting in the address for delivery was
review: Putting in the address for delivery was frustrating but apart from that everything else ok. It took me several trys to put my address in - maybe needs looking at

title: Not what it said on the advert was very
review: Not what it said on the advert was very dry and powdery foundation didn't match my skin didn't return as saw the other reviews and thought it wasn't worth that hassle

title: BIGGEST RIPP OFF IN THE WORLD
review: I am beyond frustrated with my experience with Il Makiage, and I genuinely feel misled by their so-called trial offer.They heavily advertise a risk-free trial for their foundation  implying you can try the product and return it within 14 days if its not right for you. Sounds fair, right? Wrong.Heres what actually happened:They pre-authorised my card for the full amount, and that money immediately left my available balance. So lets be clear  this is not some harmless hold that doesnt affect you. The funds were unavailable in my account the entire time I was within the trial window.I processed my return well within the 14-day period, exactly as instructed. The return was accepted. But the moment the return was processed, the pre-authorisation charge completely vanished from my account history  and the money never came back.No refund. No returned funds. Just gone.And trying to deal with customer service has been an absolute nightmare. Slow responses, generic copy-and-paste replies, no real accountability, and no clear explanation of where my money is. It feels intentionally confusing.If youre advertising a risk-free trial, customers should not: Lose access to their money for weeks Have charges mysteriously disappear without refunds Struggle to get clear answers from supportThis whole process feels deceptive. A trial should mean you arent financially penalised for trying a product. Instead, this feels like a trap hidden behind clever marketing.I will not be purchasing from them again, and I strongly urge others to read the fine print and monitor their bank accounts carefully if they decide to try it.Extremely disappointing experience.

title: Not consumer-friendly, proceed with caution
review: My experience with IL MAKIAGE was extremely disappointing. Their business practices are not consumer-friendly, and dealing with customer service felt unnecessarily difficult and stressful.There was a clear lack of transparency and accountability, and resolving a straightforward issue required far more effort than it should. The overall process left me with little confidence in how customers are treated once payment has been taken.I strongly advise potential customers to think twice, keep all receipts and evidence, and monitor their bank statements closely. Based on my experience, I would not purchase from this company again.

title: Avoid!
review: I placed an order back in December and was automatically signed up to a subscription. Once I received my foundation I cancelled the subscription, only to have been charged again today! I have logged into my account and have no active subscription so cannot understand why the company have taken a further 39 from my account?? I have now had to dispute the transaction with my bank and block all further attempts of them taking payment. I have never come across a company who takes money for a cancelled subscription and will avoid at all costs and warn everyone. Please do not buy from this company. Lets just hope I get my money back.

title: Love the products
review: Love the products, however, when I needed to cancel subs it was very difficult?? And kept sending and charging me, I tried several times to state it became unaffordable!!! And would like to just order when I needed, thanks Lisa a May

title: Guilty of false advertising & fake promises!
review: I would rate the products by Il Makiage to be halfway decent, but not any better than other brands that are far less expensive, like Paulas Choice, CoverGirl, Revlon, Maybeline, etc. In fact, the Il Makiage foundation doesnt blur the skin at all in my opinion, or offer full coverage unless you apply multiple layers, and then it starts to look cakey and gross. In addition, it irritated my eyes every time I used it, with stinging & watering, if it even got within the vicinity of my eyes, so I just threw it away.But the one thing that really INFURIATED me, and which I think should qualify for a class action lawsuit against them for false advertising, is that they continuously, relentlessly and endlessly text and email their customers with offers of quote Free, full-sized product. This is how they try to get you to place new orders often. But the gift has been an ugly black hair scrunchie, (worth about $1 on Amazon or Temu), over and over again. Every free gift Ive received has been this same cheap, useless item! How can a hair scrunchie be called full sized.They are purposely using that term to mislead you into thinking that you are going to get some new makeup, or a mascara, or skin prep, so that you can try something new of theirs. Its a complete lie and is a very shady business practice!They must assume that their customers are completely stupid and that well just keep falling for the same con game. Because of this action alone, I will NEVER order with them again! They need to do better to be honest and fulfill their promised offers!! Shame on them!!

title: Great customer service
review: I had a query and it was dealt with immediately

title: Accidentally signed up but cancelled
review: Accidentally signed up but cancelled straight away. They took 64 from my bank account (temp hold). I contacted them straight away. They said the product is sent straight away if I didn't like i could return for a refund. The item never arrived. After 3 weeks contacted my bank and eventually the amount was returned. My bank blocked payments but I see today another 64 is on temp hold again. So called subscription cancelled. Want my money back please. Very confusing site. Don't put in any details. Stay away!Edit: customer service has been in touch. They've said they will cancel the auto renewal. Which i already thought had been and remove the hold on the 64 funds in my account. Will wait and see and change if so!

Also super into a subscription. Very expensive lesson learned here. Avoid this company if you can or do what I should have done and read every bit of the small print. This is not the before you buy. It is the full charge taken off at checkout immediately.

I didnt like the product in the first instance so had no intention of using them again. Numerous emails back and forth to customer services are either ignored or they just remind me to spend their e-gift on my next check out. Do not us them. They are unscrupulous

title: The customer service from this company
review: The customer service from this company is amazing. Unfortunately their foundations didn't suit me, but I will try their other products that they have ! X

review: I ordered another foundation and it was completely the wrong colour, Il makiage immediately replaced for me and told me to keep the previous one! Their customer service is second to none ??As for the foundation itself, I love it and only ever order from here. Its lightweight with medium coverage and doesnt look heavy or cakey like other brands. Highly recommend and will always buy from here

title: BEWARE: Scam Artists
review: I used this companys try before you buy program for the power camo redness defense. The product did not make an ounce of difference to the redness of my skin. They were probably using filters on their promotional videos and photos. Typical of companies who practice scammy procedures with low ethics like the one I am about to describe below:I returned the product within the allotted time frame for try before you buy. They charged me for the product anyway. When I contacted them, they refused to issue a refund. I now have no product, and they kept my money. I have reported them to the FTC, the BBB, and my State Attorney General.Please protect yourself and do not fall for policies that are actually lies.

title: Due to ads and reviews
review: Due to ads, and reviews I Was very excited to try this foundation, although expensive, I was expecting great things, unfortunately it was not to be, my colour was chosen for me, didn't like the colour, or the way it felt on my skin, it looked dry, I'm sad that I wasted my money, money I couldn't really afford, but the ads, and reviews draw you in, and before you know it bang, you've ordered it.

title: They charge you 9.95 to cancel your
review: They charge you 9.95 to cancel your subscription. Then continue to proceed with taking 10.95 every month. I've sent endless emails and given them proof of the cancellation letter. When you get your statement it has unshabby on it. It should be shady as that's exactly what they are.

title: Customer service sucks
review: The products are good, but the customer service is extremely disappointing. My package was lost, and I was assured that the auto-replenishment would be cancelled and that I wouldnt be charged for the missing items. However, I later noticed a large charge on my credit card. When I contacted them about it, my emails were ignored  even after sending over 100 messages, I never received a reply. The same issue has happened to my friends as well. Overall, the customer service experience has been very poor. They are cheats

title: Report to trading standards
review: Please dont fall for this awful scam. I fell for the trial foundation for postage cost only. The site is full of pop ups and I somehow also ordered an add on product for 39.20. The full cost of the foundation 39 is pending on my account and 39.20 has already been taken from my account for an add on product that was not ordered, not shipped and not received. I attempted to cancel the orders immediately by emailing Customer support (no telephone contact) and was advised to return the items once received as it was too late to cancel, even though I requested cancellation within an hour. The foundation was delivered today which I immediately initiated a return for, and 39 payment still pending. The add on item was not delivered so I cannot return what I have not received, but 39.20 for the invisible product has been taken unlawfully from my account anyway.I thought I was spending 2.45 postage to trial foundation and so far it has in fact cost 80.65, several days of worry, emails back and forth to il Makiage with AI generated, generic responses. I have now reported to my bank. I will also be reporting to trading standards. If you have been caught out, please also report this company to trading standards. This company needs investigating. Note update: despite the response from Il Makiage below. I have in fact been charged, the money has left my account and is not pending.

title: Don't be fooled
review: What a con this company is I fell for the try before etc it had only been delivered half an hour when the took 39.95 out of my bank! 6 emails later they agreed they shouldn't of I returned it came of the subscription list! and they sent a email confirming and asking what they could do to change my mind! low and behold they have just taken 39.95 again!!

title: SCAM COMPANY WILL CHARGE YOUR CARD FOR
review: SCAM COMPANY WILL CHARGE YOUR CARD FOR MONTHS. I did not listen to the reddit reviews and fell for this scam.They sent a broken bottle. They kept charging my card for months even after I returned the first purchase and kept saying they will refund it but did not. I had to mark my card as stolen and go through the trouble of going to the bank because of this. DO NOT BUY OR ENTER YOUR CARD DETAILS ON THIS WEBSITE. The shade was not at all what was shown on ads, its so yellow and drying. I have acne scars and I'd rather be bare skin then use this formula.

title: Extremely Misleading Website
review: My daughter placed an order in my name using my PayPal, believing the product was free because of how misleading the website is. After checking the site myself, I reported it to Trading Standards and Facebook because the advertising is absolutely not clear. IT IS NOT FREE.I contacted the company within 30 minutes of the order being placed, only to be told it was too late to cancel. In todays technology, thats very hard to believe. Customer service was unhelpful and sent nothing but a generic, copy?and?paste reply.There was no tracking information provided at all. When the goods finally arrived, I was shocked at how overpriced they were for such a mediocre product. The items have now been returned, and I have no idea how long Ill be waiting for a refund. I will update once (or if) it arrives.I have now received my refund, and have only ever received generic responses. I do not know if the product is any good as I never got to try it. This review is solely about their customer service.

title: Great products!
review: I have bought various different items from IL Makiage over the past year or so and have not been disappointed once. I love there products and they really suit my skin type in colour and texture. Theyre a little bit on the pricey side, however I do look forward to the extra freebies.

review: They tend to add things onto your order by sneakily making you press some buttons. Thats the reason Ive taken off a star. That should absolutely not be allowed.

I tecieved a email sayin this is and offer if you want the product put #1 ,which was to receive the product and then after 30 day if you dont like it return it and you wont be charged and we will give you 20 percent discount and #2 was to cancel it the order so I selected #1 for them to go a head and send it too me I got a email saying that my order was canceled. title: Please be very careful with this

title: I did not receive my order
review: I did not receive my order, Which I believed was a 5 sample pot. Then I noticed 130 was taken from my bank? Obviously I contacted my bank and was told I had a monthly subscription???? Which I definitely did not do. Long story short I did get my money back and cancelled the monthly subscription. I would never order anything from them again. Just my bad experience.

title: Worst customer experience to date
review: Absolute shambles. First of all, after taking the shade match quiz my foundation was completely off. When I tried to log in to arrange a return - my account simply doesn't exist..? It is impossible to log in with my email address (which they clearly have on their system as they send me spam emails literally twice a day sometimes...) when I go to create an account it tells me that my phone number is invalid (I've tried entering it in every format possible..) so I therefore cannot create an account. I ALREADY HAVE AN ACCOUNT BUT I CANNOT ACCESS IT. I finally got a response from customer services, but it was too late to return the foundation so I ended up paying for it. When I spoke to them, I asked them to cancel any future subscriptions which they assured me they did. I am now getting emails saying my next order is ready to ship (YAAAAY... NOT.) and you guessed it - can't access my account, can't enter my phone number, can't create an account..... WHY IS IT IMPOSSIBLE TO LOG IN ?! Is this actually the business model...? People just end up paying because they are so exhausted trying to cancel the subscription? I will be so pissed if I receive and have to pay for another bottle of this foundation. Even if it was the right shade, it's not even nice. It's super thick and heavy and looks cakey af. Avoid at all costs. Awful awful awful. There should be minus stars for this kind of thing.

title: Disappointed
review: I really wish I hadn't spent money on foundation, it sits horribly on my skin and makes me feel greasy. I've tried it a few times now and it smudges really easily and if I touch it, it comes off. I just can't recommend it.

I have emailed several times and was repeatedly told my order was on its way, yet my account still only shows it as processed.I was expecting this order before the New Year, but due to the lack of honest updates and poor communication, I was left with no choice but to go out and buy replacement makeup myself.The customer service is appalling  no clear information, no accountability, and no effort to keep customers informed. Being misled about an orders status is unacceptable.I would not recommend ordering from this company unless youre prepared for delays and very poor customer communication.

However, I did contact support and got a generic reply and was told I wasnt using bottle pump correctly with instructions. Customer service is terrible, thank goodness I paid with PayPal.I will not support a company/business with unethical behaviour and want others to be aware, you may be paying for a new product and getting a used one!
